nasb.text: Zion heard this and was glad, And the daughters of Judah have rejoiced Because of Your judgments, O Lord.

esv.text: Zion hears and is glad, and the daughters of Judah rejoice, because of your judgments, O Lord.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！錫安聽見你的判斷就歡喜， 猶大的各城也都快樂。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，听见你的审判， 锡安就欢喜， 犹大的城邑就快乐。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，因你的审判， 锡安听了就欢喜，犹大女子也快乐！
